decks.notes: The deck revolves around playing aggressive Goblin creatures and quickly overwhelming the opponent's defenses. Key cards such as Goblin Lackey and Goblin Ringleader help to quickly build a board presence, while cards like Goblin Piledriver and Siege-Gang Commander provide powerful finishers. The inclusion of cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Goblin Sharpshooter further enhances the deck's ability to clear out opposing threats and maintain control of the battlefield. Additionally, the deck utilizes land destruction with cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base and slow down their game plan.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells and removal spells, while utilizing the card advantage provided by Standstill. The deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant board presence with cards like Exalted Angel and Mishra's Factory. It also has the ability to disrupt the opponent's resources with cards like Dust Bowl and Disenchant. The overall strategy is to control the pace of the game and out-value the opponent with powerful spells and efficient creatures.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and disrupting the opponent's hand with discard spells. By using cards like Dark Ritual to quickly ramp up mana, paired with efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Knight of Stromgald, the deck aims to apply pressure early on. Graveborn Muse provides card advantage, while Withered Wretch and Nantuko Shade offer additional utility. The deck also includes removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict to deal with opposing threats. Mishra's Factory and Wasteland offer additional sources of damage and disruption.

The deck focuses on aggressive, low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. With a combination of efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to quickly deplete the opponent's life total before they can stabilize. Mishra's Factory provides additional creature threats, while Cursed Scroll and Barbarian Ring offer additional reach in finishing off the opponent. The deck's game plan is to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game to secure a quick victory.

The main concept of this deck is to create a powerful combo utilizing enchantments. By utilizing cards like Enchantress's Presence, Serra's Sanctum, and Opalescence, the deck aims to generate value and card advantage while ramping up mana. The deck also includes tools like Sterling Grove, Parallax Wave, and Solitary Confinement to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With cards like Mirri's Guile and Sylvan Library for card selection and consistency, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence.

This mono-black aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with efficient, aggressive creatures like Nantuko Shade, Hypnotic Specter, and Withered Wretch. It also utilizes disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure. The deck is designed to remain fast and consistent, with cards like Mishra's Factory and Dark Ritual providing additional versatility and speed. Additionally, the inclusion of utility lands like Spawning Pool and Wasteland helps to further disrupt the opponent's strategies and maintain control of the battlefield.

The deck focuses on manipulating the opponent's deck and hand while quickly assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to take control of the game. By using cards like Opt, Gush, and Vision Charm to dig for combo pieces and disruption like Counterspell and Foil to protect the combo, the deck aims to quickly win through a powerful and efficient game plan. With a mix of card draw, counterspells, and combo pieces, the deck aims to outmaneuver and outpace the opponent in order to secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly getting out a Phyrexian Dreadnought and then using a combination of countermagic and card draw to protect it. Stifling opponent's removal spells or abilities is essential to keep the Dreadnought on the battlefield and swing for lethal damage. The deck also includes ways to dig for key cards and disrupt the opponent's game plan, allowing the combo to come together smoothly. By efficiently building up resources and disrupting the opponent's strategy, this deck aims to win through a powerful combo finish.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing powerful control spells such as Counterspell, Mana Leak, and Swords to Plowshares, while also maintaining a lock on the board with cards like Standstill and Humility. The deck aims to stall the game out until it can establish a dominant board presence with land cards like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, eventually overwhelming the opponent with card advantage and powerful threats like Decree of Justice. The deck's strength lies in its ability to disrupt the opponent's game plan while slowly building towards a win condition.

The deck revolves around utilizing Ill-Gotten Gains to set up a game-winning combo by using cards like Brain Freeze and Infernal Contract to mill the opponent's deck. The deck also includes mana accelerators like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to facilitate the combo. Intuition is used to tutor for key combo pieces, while cards like Chain of Vapor provide disruption and protection. The deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent before they can respond effectively.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive black creatures and disruption spells. By utilizing cards like Hypnotic Specter, Graveborn Muse, and Nantuko Shade, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain card advantage. Additionally, cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy provide disruption by targeting the opponent's hand. To support this aggressive strategy, the deck also includes removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict. Utilizing the efficient mana acceleration of Dark Ritual and versatile land destruction of Wasteland, the deck aims to establish early board dominance and secure victory.

This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bring them back to the battlefield with Reanimate and Exhume. Cabal Therapy and Unmask help disrupt the opponent's game plan while also filling up the graveyard. Verdant Force provides a steady stream of tokens to overwhelm the opponent. Akroma, Angel of Wrath, Multani, Maro-Sorcerer, Phantom Nishoba, and Symbiotic Wurm offer powerful threats that are difficult to deal with. Dark Ritual and Life/Death help facilitate explosive plays, allowing the deck to win quickly and decisively.

This deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to create a synergistic combo engine that can generate card advantage and protection. By utilizing cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile, you can draw additional cards and set up your combos. Key cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave provide win conditions by turning your enchantments into creatures and controlling the board. Additionally, cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing offer utility and disruption. With a mixture of ramp, card draw, and removal, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver its opponents.

The main concept of this deck is to create a powerful combo by using enchantments to generate card advantage and control the board. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Argothian Enchantress, Windswept Heath, and Wild Growth to quickly ramp up mana and draw cards. Additionally, cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave provide ways to control the opponent's board while building up your own army of enchantments. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with enchantment synergy and card advantage, ultimately leading to victory through powerful combos and efficient control.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat on the board while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and tempo plays. The deck aims to control the game by efficiently protecting its combo pieces and using cantrips to dig for essential cards. By utilizing a mix of disruption and card advantage, it seeks to outmaneuver opponents and secure a win through a combination of fast aggression and efficient resource management.

This deck focuses on utilizing cards that benefit from discarding cards, such as Basking Rootwalla and Wild Mongrel, to quickly fill up the graveyard for Threshold abilities and Madness triggers. The aggressive creatures in the deck, like Patrol Hound and Savannah Lions, put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Cards like Tireless Tribe and Arrogant Wurm provide big threats that can quickly end the game. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Wasteland to control the opponent's board.
